events.title: ESA/DLR Career Day @ TUM Garching
events.summary: Recruiters and research engineers from ESA, DLR, and Munich space startups discuss thesis paths, YGT applications, and entry routes into space systems engineering.

events.title: TUM Space Initiative Open Lab Night
events.summary: Student teams show current rover, payload, and CubeSat work. Good low-pressure place to reconnect with people who already know Lina from TUM Space.

events.title: Space Systems Thesis Matchmaking Evening
events.summary: Short pitches from chairs with open thesis topics in orbital robotics, autonomy, and mission design, followed by 1:1 sign-up slots.

events.title: Deutschlandstipendium Clinic for Engineers
events.summary: Thirty-minute application clinic focused on strong motivation letters and evidence selection for engineering students before the 30 April deadline.

events.title: IAC 2026 Student Participation Info Session
events.summary: Overview of student registration, travel grants, and networking strategy for the International Astronautical Congress 2026.

events.title: Founders' Breakfast: Deep Tech in Munich
events.summary: Open networking breakfast for students curious about deep-tech startups, product roles, and early venture teams around Munich.

events.title: CV Photo + LinkedIn Drop-in Clinic
events.summary: Low-commitment drop-in slot for better application photos, profile headlines, and quick LinkedIn cleanup.

events.title: Language Tandem Meetup: Spanish and German Exchange
events.summary: Informal evening meetup for students practicing Spanish and German. Not career-specific, but realistic background activity in the campus ecosystem.
